description: Add contact email row types to shared contact interfaces, replacing scalar contact email with `email_addresses`, `default_email_address`, and `default_email_type`.
Create database tables and constraints for contact email rows and tenant-scoped custom email label definitions.
Add a migration that converts existing scalar contact email values into one default email row per contact and removes the scalar database column.
Implement shared contact-model validation for multi-email rows, including canonical/custom label validation, exactly-one-default enforcement, and row ordering.
Enforce tenant-wide uniqueness on normalized email addresses in both create and update contact flows.
Implement contact-model persistence helpers to replace and hydrate email rows and derive default email summary fields on reads.
Update contact search and lookup paths to match any stored email row instead of a scalar contact email column.
Create a shared `ContactEmailAddressesEditor` component modeled on `ContactPhoneNumbersEditor`, including row add/remove/reorder/default behavior.
Support canonical email labels `work`, `personal`, `billing`, and `other`, plus custom labels with tenant suggestion lookup and cleanup behavior.
Wire the contact create dialog to save normalized multi-email rows instead of a scalar email field.
Wire contact edit/detail screens to save and render multi-email rows and remove scalar contact-email editing.
Update contact list and client contact list screens to display the derived default email summary.
Update contact pickers and search result payloads to return and display default-email summaries from the multi-email model.
Update inbound email shared services to match contacts by any stored email row and return both matched sender email and default email context.
Update workflow email actions and runtime email-processing actions to resolve contacts through the email-row model.
Update workflow/runtime contact payload schemas to expose `email_addresses`, `default_email_address`, and `default_email_type`.
Update the email-processing workflow definition so matched sender email and default outbound email are mapped distinctly.
Update ticket email subscriber logic to resolve requester/default contact email from the multi-email model.
Update project notifications, surveys, and invoice-contact sends to use the resolved default contact email.
Update watch-list contact selection and related picker logic to use default-email summaries from the multi-email model.
Update portal invitation, portal recovery, and contact-driven registration flows so contact default email is the canonical invite/login address.
Update auth-adjacent contact verification and registration helpers to resolve contacts by any stored email row.
Update REST contact schemas and contact API services to accept and return the multi-email contact contract.
Update ticket/contact API response schemas that currently expose scalar contact email summaries to derive them from the default email row.
Update n8n contact create/update/list support to use the multi-email contract instead of scalar contact email.
Update integration helpers and email/contact lookup actions to resolve contacts through stored email rows.
Update test fixtures, factories, and helper builders that currently construct contacts with scalar email.
Add representative DB-backed migration/model coverage for multi-email contact creation, update, lookup, and uniqueness.
